strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Direct match on primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is dated (robotic arms work pre-2018)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate divergence from primary JS/TS ecosystem
response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years, with direct experience in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Git, plus highly relevant recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP generators that aligns with the AI agent development requirement. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are real but learnable given the demonstrated polyglot background and software-craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev). Strong signals of communication ability via workshops, talks, and open-source leadership reinforce fit for a mid-senior IC role.
